selector.description: Select all rise-type nodes from the recipe graph plus portioning and flour data from the dough layer.

projection.description: For each selected rise node, extract riseMethod, baseDur, tf, userOverride. The tf (time factor) comes from the rise_methods catalog.

aggregation.description: Compute derived aggregate values from all selected rise phases.

computations.description: Sum of (baseDur/60)/tf for each phase. Converts wall-clock time to equivalent room-temperature hours.
Percentage mismatch between equivalentRoomHours and portioning.doughHours.
Maximum wall-clock hours among fridge-method phases.

computations.algorithm: scan nodeSequence for fridge-rise → bake/pre_bake without intervening room-temp rise
computations.description: Boolean: true if a fridge rise is directly followed by bake/pre_bake with no room-temp acclimatization in between.
Expected yeast percentage based on equivalentRoomHours, using Formula L (yeast_pct).
Percentage mismatch between expected and actual yeast percentage.

validation.description: Evaluate fermentation_coherence rules against the aggregated context.

parametric.description: Redistribute rise phase durations so equivalent room-hours match the target. Preserves user-overridden phases; adjusts only non-overridden ones by applying a uniform scale factor.
parametric.algorithm: fixedEquiv = SUM(baseDur_i/60/tf_i) for userOverride phases; remainingEquiv = max(0, target - fixedEquiv); scaleFactor = remainingEquiv / currentAdjustableEquiv; newBaseDur_i = max(15, round(baseDur_i * scaleFactor))

suggestion.description: Suggest yeast percentage for given equivalent room-temperature hours using Formula L.

description: Cross-node fermentation coherence validation. Checks that rise phases are coherent with each other, with portioning settings, and with flour properties. Implements the Selector → Projection → Aggregation → Validation pattern for multi-node constraints.
